purpose: Locked panel lane requiring explicit owner gate before any activation.
truth_rules: Locked panel is never real/candidate in this task.
Unlock requires dedicated admission task and owner gate.
proof_requirements: Locked panel status shown in truth map and reports.
fake_green_risks: Locked panel displayed as operable cockpit.
accessibility_rules: State must not be encoded by color alone.
RU/EN labels must remain explicit for status tags.
change_safety: Topology hardening scope only; no final UI readiness claims.
backend_source_unknown_reason: Panel lane is locked by governance and has no active backend mapping.
